fare: Geolocate yourself and discover all the Paris 2024 Games events near you! Celebration venues, cultural events, the torch relay route: live your own Paris 2024 Games experience, with or without a ticket, everywhere in France.
cookiesTxt: En cliquant sur « Accepter tous les cookies », vous acceptez le stockage de cookies sur votre appareil pour améliorer la navigation sur le site, analyser son utilisation et contribuer à nos efforts de marketing.
title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
titleone: Why did Paris sport open a participatory platform?
txtGlobal: Despite this image problem, the first Olympic Games organized in France represent an important event, since 997 athletes, including the first 22 women in history, from 24 countries, participated in the 95 events organized
txtGlobalI: The Olympic character of the events is so little emphasized that many spectators and athletes have, for a long time (and sometimes until their death) no idea that they have attended the Olympic Games.
txtGlobalII: the Games are organized again in Paris and in the surrounding municipalities, since 1900, the event has gained momentum. This time, the Games do exist in their own name, and are generating great enthusiasm in the capital. In 1924, 17 sports appeared on the Olympic program for 126 events, during which 3089 athletes competed, including 135 women. The growing scale of the event reached a global scope, since 44 countries sent athletes to the Games, from five continents.
